subTitle: Besides his girlfriend, Kumaran is very passionate about kick-boxing. His life is shattered when his dying mother asks him to meet his estranged father in Malaysia.

subTitle: Shyamala's family abandons her when she marries against their wishes. Years later, her son Akash ties the knot with a girl of his choice and Shyamala does not accept it.

subTitle: A few political goons, disguised as Muslims, cause trouble at the temple and kill Raghuraman's family. Later, Raghuraman joins an extremist group and decides to avenge his family's death.

title: Aaru Sundarimaarude Katha

title: My Dear Mummy
subTitle: Widowed young, Katrina strives to overcome life's challenges. Determined to improve her English skills, she enrols in her daughter Sandra's college, embarking on a transformative journey of personal growth.

subTitle: When Prabhu's daughter gets possessed by a young boy, the distraught father's desperation to save his child leads him to his estranged twin, who has serial killing tendencies.

title: CARNIVAL
subTitle: Bharatan, a gambler, finds employment at the local carnival and soon becomes the favourite employee. However, things get complicated when the owner of the company dies and Bharatan is accused.
